news.headline: Genesys Cloud platform hits $1.8B ARR in Q3 FY2025, with 40% YoY growth, 120% NRR for 11th quarter. Organizations favor AI.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Genesys®, a prominent global cloud company specializing in AI-Powered Experience Orchestration, recently announced that its Genesys Cloud™ platform achieved close to $1.8 billion in annual recurring revenue (ARR) during the third quarter of the fiscal year 2025 (Aug. 1 – Oct. 31, 2024). Showing a growth rate of over 40% compared to the previous year, the Genesys Cloud ARR experienced accelerated expansion from the second quarter of fiscal year 2025. Additionally, Genesys Cloud's net revenue retention (NRR) exceeded 120% for the 11th consecutive quarter, demonstrating a strong financial performance.

news.headline: IDIQ names Mark Fraser as new Chief Product Officer, with 20+ years of experience. Joined as EVP a year ago.
news.summary: In Temecula, California, financial intelligence leader IDIQ® revealed the appointment of Mark Fraser as their new chief product officer. Fraser, an industry veteran with over 20 years of senior experience in product management, marketing, and general management, has significantly contributed to the growth of the insurance, credit, and identity protection sectors. Previously serving as the executive vice president and general manager at IDIQ, Fraser's expertise will continue to drive the company forward.

news.headline: Visa Direct enables funds to be available in U.S. bank accounts in one minute or less starting April 2025. Real-time deposits with eligible debit cards.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, Visa, a prominent player in digital payments, unveiled that funds transferred to U.S. bank accounts will be attainable in 1 minute or less through Visa Direct beginning in April 2025. This service allows consumers, businesses, and governments to promptly deposit funds into bank accounts associated with eligible debit cards in real-time. This development enables various financial transactions like splitting bills, transferring funds between accounts, receiving insurance claim payouts, and facilitating worker wage payments swiftly and efficiently.

news.headline: Wolters Kluwer launches conversational AI feature in CCH AnswerConnect for faster, efficient tax answers.
news.summary: A new conversational AI feature has been introduced in CCH AnswerConnect by Wolters Kluwer Tax and Accounting (TAA) based in Minneapolis. This enhancement comes after integrating CCH AnswerConnect with CCH Axcess Tax in October. The goal of the expanded AI capabilities is to offer users quicker, more effective, and natural interactions during tax answer searches. Wolters Kluwer aims to enhance the user experience through these innovations as part of its continuous efforts to revolutionize the tax profession.

news.headline: Opto Co-Founder Kamal Jafarnia joins Vise as General Counsel to expand Total Portfolio Solution for RIA Aggregators.
news.summary: Kamal Jafarnia, Co-Founder of Opto Investments, has recently been appointed as the General Counsel at Vise in New York City. In this role, Jafarnia will spearhead the expansion of the total portfolio solution for RIA aggregators. This move signifies a strategic step in enhancing Vise's offerings in the investment sector.

news.headline: FIS HORIZON, a community banking core banking platform, wins XCelent Award for Advanced Technology, boosting deposit growth.
news.summary: In Jacksonville, Florida, FIS, a renowned financial technology company listed on NYSE as FIS, disclosed that its HORIZON community banking core banking platform has been acknowledged by Celent in the XCelent Awards program. The platform triumphed in the Advanced Technology category, showcasing FIS's capability in enhancing deposit growth and wallet share for its customers with highly adaptable and scalable core systems. This recognition highlights FIS's commitment to providing innovative solutions for its clients and reinforcing its position as a global leader in financial technology.

news.headline: intelliflo redblack enhances services with 110+ customer-driven changes to benefit advisors and clients.
news.summary: Intelliflo RedBlack has announced the launch of over 110 new customer-oriented rebalancing and trading features aimed at enhancing advisor productivity and improving client results.

news.headline: Thoughtworks partners with AWS in APAC to develop GenAI solutions, aiming to accelerate transformation in the region.
news.summary: In Singapore, Thoughtworks has entered into a strategic partnership with AWS in the Asia-Pacific region. The agreement aims to create GenAI solutions focused on enhancing operational efficiencies.

news.headline: UChicago Medicine uses Abridge AI, improving patient and clinician experience. 200 physicians used technology in six weeks.
news.summary: The University of Chicago Medicine conducted a pilot program in partnership with a generative AI platform, yielding positive outcomes in clinical documentation. Patient and clinician experiences were enhanced based on survey data from the academic health system. The program's success led to its expansion to over 800 clinicians within the health system. Approximately 200 physicians at UChicago Medicine utilized Abridge’s technology during a six-week period.

news.headline: MorganMyers agency announces Robin Brannin as Managing Director, effective Jan 1, 2025. Leading agriculture and food marketing firm.
news.summary: A prominent agriculture and food marketing agency, MorganMyers LLC, under the G&S Integrated Marketing Communications Group, has appointed Robin Brannin as the Managing Director starting January 1, 2025. In her new role, Brannin will oversee the operations of MorganMyers, emphasizing on providing high-quality results for clients and maintaining the agency's reputation as a reliable partner in the agricultural sector.

news.headline: micromobility.com appoints Gian Luca Spriano as CEO, effective December 9, 2024. Salvatore Palella steps down as CEO and director.
news.summary: In New York, micromobility.com Inc. revealed a significant leadership change with the selection of Gian Luca Spriano as the new Chief Executive Officer and board member, starting December 9, 2024. Spriano takes over from Salvatore Palella, who resigned from his positions as CEO and board member. Palella, the primary shareholder, no longer holds any executive or board roles within the company. Spriano's appointment brings a wealth of expertise and knowledge to the company.

news.headline: Homebuying demand near spring levels as mortgage rates drop. Weekly mortgage rate at 6.69% from 6.84%.
news.summary: In Seattle, there has been a notable uptick in home tours, mortgage applications, and pending sales as mortgage rates have decreased from a four-month high reached at the end of November. Redfin's recent report indicates that these metrics are on the rise, with mortgage rates currently at an average weekly rate of 6.69%, down from the peak of 6.84%. This drop follows a recent jobs report that indicated lower-than-expected numbers, prompting expectations of an upcoming interest rate cut by the Federal Reserve. This trend suggests a positive momentum in the real estate market, as more prospective buyers are taking advantage of the lower rates to explore home buying opportunities.

news.headline: Mesh Payments partners with SoFi Bank and Galileo to enhance travel expense management; SoFi Technologies owns Galileo.
news.summary: A collaboration has been announced between Mesh Payments, a global travel and expense management company, and SoFi Bank and Galileo Financial Technologies. Mesh Payments has partnered with SoFi Bank as its sponsor bank and with Galileo Financial Technologies, owned by SoFi Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: SOFI), as its payments processor. This alliance combines Mesh Payments’ advanced expense and card system with SoFi Bank’s flexible financial structure and Galileo’s innovative technology. The partnership aims to enhance payment processing services for clients worldwide.

news.headline: ERShares XOVR ETF invests $20M in SpaceX, becoming top holding. ETF offers accessible private equity.
news.summary: Recently in New York on December 12, 2024, EntrepreneurShares (ERShares) introduced the first and only ETF for retail investors, changing how they access private equity. This move is groundbreaking as it provides unprecedented opportunities for retail investors to participate in entrepreneurial and disruptive investment strategies. The news marks a significant milestone in the financial industry as ERShares' pioneering ETF has opened up new avenues for retail investors to navigate private equity investments. This development signifies a paradigm shift, highlighting ERShares' efforts to democratize access to private equity for all investors.

news.headline: Seven Hills Realty Trust elects Ann Danner as Independent Trustee to Board of Trustees. Nasdaq: SEVN.
news.summary: New announcement from Newton, Massachusetts: Seven Hills Realty Trust (Nasdaq: SEVN) appoints Ann M. Danner as an Independent Trustee to its Board of Trustees.

news.headline: Ontario Int Airport expects 350,000 winter holiday travelers, 22% higher than pre-pandemic.
news.summary: During the year-end holiday period in 2024, Ontario International Airport (ONT) in Southern California is forecasted to see a significant surge in passenger traffic compared to pre-pandemic levels, with a nearly 22% increase. Over 350,000 travelers are expected to pass through ONT, indicating a strong recovery in air travel.

news.headline: XiFin wins 2024 Best in Business Award for Revenue Cycle Management by Modern Healthcare and other global outlets.
news.summary: In San Diego today, XiFin, Inc., a prominent company offering advanced healthcare information technologies and services utilizing artificial intelligence, proudly shared their recent recognition by Modern Healthcare and various global business and financial media. XiFin was honored by Modern Healthcare as one of the recipients of the 2024 Best in Business Awards for Revenue Cycle Management. This acknowledgement highlights XiFin's commitment to enhancing operational efficiency, interoperability, and simplification in healthcare services.

news.headline: Forte Opening Solutions chooses GTT for secure data and resilient connectivity for cloud manufacturing apps.
news.summary: A company in Arlington, Virginia, named Forte Opening Solutions has chosen GTT to provide data security and reliable connectivity for their cloud-based manufacturing applications. This decision was made in light of the increasing importance of 5G technology.

news.headline: ModMed awards champions in healthcare operations with 2nd annual Practice HERO Awards in Boca Raton, FL.
news.summary: ModMed, based in Boca Raton, Florida, recently revealed the winners of the 2nd annual Healthcare Excellence in Refining Operations (HERO) Awards.

news.headline: Armstrong World Industries named one of America’s Most Responsible Companies for 2025 by Newsweek for the third year in a row. CEO Vic Grizzle expresses honor and commitment to sustainability. (Characters: 176)
news.summary: Armstrong World Industries Inc. (NYSE: AWI), a prominent provider of ceiling and wall solutions, has been recognized as one of America’s Most Responsible Companies by Newsweek for the third year in a row. Vic Grizzle, the President and CEO of AWI, expressed gratitude for the honor, stating, “Being acknowledged as one of America’s Most Responsible Companies for the third consecutive year is a great achievement for us. This award highlights our commitment to sustainable and ethical business practices.”

news.headline: Frost & Sullivan recognizes Checkmarx as a Competitive Strategy Leader in Global ASPM Industry for 2024. Checkmarx offers cloud-native application security for enterprises.
news.summary: Checkmarx, a leading provider of cloud-native application security solutions, has been recognized by Frost & Sullivan for its competitive strategy leadership in the global application security posture management (ASPM) sector. The prestigious Best Practices Award for 2024 highlights Checkmarx's innovation and dedication to providing enterprise leaders with comprehensive insights into application risks and a proactive approach to application security. This acknowledgement underscores Checkmarx's commitment to equipping organizations with the tools they need to effectively manage application security.

news.headline: Global dry chemistry analyzer market valued at USD 15.2 billion in 2023, expected to reach $33.2 billion by 2034 at a 7.4% CAGR. Key players driving innovation, market penetration.
news.summary: The global dry chemistry analyzer market was valued at USD 15.2 billion in 2023 and is expected to grow at a CAGR of 7.4% from 2024 to 2034, reaching USD 33.2 billion by 2034. These analyzers are vital for modern diagnostics, providing compact, rapid, and reagent-free solutions for biochemical analysis in clinical laboratories, point-of-care testing, and veterinary applications. The market is driven by the demand for efficient diagnostic tools, coupled with the rise in chronic diseases. Major players in the market include Shenzhen Mindray Bio-Medical Electronics Co., Thermo Fisher Scientific, Danaher Corporation, Abbott Laboratories, Siemens Healthineers, and more. Their strategies include product innovation, mergers and acquisitions, regional expansion, and sustainability initiatives. The market offers opportunities for stakeholders and is a valuable resource for understanding its size, segmentation, and challenges.

news.headline: Global Critical Infrastructure Protection Market to reach $178.3 billion by 2029, led by BAE Systems, Lockheed Martin, and General Dynamics. Rise in cyberattacks drives demand for enhanced protection measures. Quantum-Resistant Cybersecurity trend on the rise.
news.summary: The global Critical Infrastructure Protection Market is expected to grow from USD 148.1 billion in 2024 to USD 178.3 billion by 2029, representing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 3.8%. This growth is driven by factors such as rising cyberattacks on critical infrastructure systems and government initiatives. There are 559 tables, 53 figures, and the report spans 398 pages. Major players in the market include BAE Systems, Lockheed Martin, and Honeywell. The market also faces challenges like a lack of trained cybersecurity professionals. Opportunities arise from the rising adoption of IoT and increased infrastructure investment. The rise in cyberattacks and investments in sectors like data centers and EV charging are spurring demand for enhanced Critical Infrastructure Protection measures. Quantum-Resistant Cybersecurity, including post-quantum cryptography and zero trust architecture, is a significant trend in the market. Government initiatives worldwide and collaborative efforts are further propelling the market growth.

news.headline: Esperion collaborates with Neopharm to market NEXLETOL and NEXLIZET in Israel, receiving upfront payment, milestones, and royalties.
news.summary: Esperion is set to receive an initial payment, as well as upcoming milestone payments, in addition to royalties based on product sales in the near future. The agreement outlines a structured payment plan and royalties that will be based on a percentage of sales. This deal is expected to bring significant financial benefits to Esperion, including an upfront payment, milestone payments, and royalties on product sales. The exact amounts of these payments and royalties have not been disclosed, but they are anticipated to contribute substantially to Esperion's revenue stream. This partnership stands to greatly impact Esperion's financial standing in both the short and long term.

news.headline: Furlani Foods buys Cole's Quality Foods, becoming top frozen garlic bread provider. Merger set to close in Q1 2025.
news.summary: A leading garlic bread brand, Furlani Foods, based in Mississauga, Ontario, is set to acquire Cole’s Quality Foods in a merger deal. This acquisition aims to combine two prominent brands in the industry, ultimately benefiting consumers. The closing of the deal is anticipated to take place in the first quarter of 2025.

news.headline: Intuit partners with PWHL in Canada, with QuickBooks named Official Accounting Software.多year deal to target small businesses.
news.summary: Intuit Inc. (Nasdaq: INTU) has partnered with the Professional Women's Hockey League in Canada, in a multi-year agreement. As the league's Official Accounting Software Partner, Intuit QuickBooks will collaborate with PWHL to support small businesses in the country. Intuit, known for its platforms like TurboTax, Credit Karma, and Mailchimp, aims to engage with the Canadian market through this alliance. This strategic partnership signifies a new avenue for Intuit to reach out to the expanding small business sector in Canada.

news.headline: Factorial introduces 40Ah all-solid-state Solstice™ battery cells with dry cathode coating for high energy density.
news.summary: A Massachusetts-based company, Factorial, has introduced new 40Ah all-solid-state Solstice™ battery cells. These cells utilize an innovative dry cathode coating to achieve increased energy density and scalability.

news.headline: Crown Labs offers $3.10 per share for Revance Therapeutics, recommendation to tender shares.
news.summary: The Board of Directors of Revance advises stockholders to submit their shares for purchase. On December 12, 2024, Crown Laboratories, Inc., a prominent global leader in skincare, initiated a cash tender offer. The offer involves acquiring a certain number of shares at a specified price per share. The exact number and value of shares to be purchased were not disclosed. Shareholders are encouraged to participate in the tender offer to potentially maximize returns on their investments in Revance.

news.headline: The Nissan Rogue SUV, launched in 2007, introduced innovative design features, becoming a bestseller for Nissan.
news.summary: NASHVILLE, Tenn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The Nissan Rogue was first introduced in 2007 as a 2008 model, setting a new standard for small SUVs with its innovative features. Departing from the norm, the Rogue utilized a unibody platform instead of a body-on-frame design, offering improved driving dynamics akin to a sedan. This design choice also contributed to its enhanced fuel efficiency compared to traditional SUVs. Soon after its launch, the first-generation Rogue became one of Nissan's top-selling models, showcasing the strong demand for its unique features.

news.headline: Cowboy Clean Fuels (CCF) partners with Tiger Transfer at Upton Logistics Center to enhance feedstock transloading.
news.summary: A strategic partnership has been formed between Cowboy Clean Fuels (CCF), a prominent climate tech and energy transition company, and Tiger Transfer, LLC, a notable rail transloading operation leader in Upton, Wyoming. The collaboration aims to bolster Cowboy's feedstock transloading operations. This partnership, effective from December 12, 2024, signifies a significant step in the energy sector. Cowboy Clean Fuels and Tiger Transfer plan to combine their expertise to enhance efficiency and sustainability in transportation services. This venture is set to impact the industry profoundly, with potential far-reaching implications.

news.headline: LiveFreely bought Sompo Horizon, a caregiving benefits provider, to enhance AI-powered caregiving.
news.summary: In San Jose, LiveFreely Inc., a digital health tech company enhancing seniors' and caregivers' lives, has acquired Sompo Horizon, a top caregiving benefits provider and Sompo Holdings subsidiary. This move aims to bolster LiveFreely's offerings and merge products like the BUDDY app with Sompo Horizon components.

news.headline: Auto finance websites and apps face challenges in customer experience and communication, as per J.D. Power report.
news.summary: In Troy, Michigan, a recent study by J.D. Power revealed concerning findings regarding the customer experience and communication effectiveness of auto finance websites and mobile apps. The research highlighted significant challenges faced by these platforms in facilitating two-way communication with users. The data suggested that improvements are needed to enhance the overall customer experience and streamline effective communication strategies. This study sheds light on a pressing issue within the industry, indicating room for growth and optimization.

news.headline: Blue Sage Solutions integrates Fannie Mae's Income Calculator, streamlining mortgage process for lenders, enhancing borrower experience.
news.summary: Blue Sage Solutions has introduced a new API-enabled integration that streamlines and automates income calculation, revolutionizing the mortgage process for lenders. This update, unveiled on December 12, 2024, in Englewood Cliffs, New Jersey, promises a more efficient and modern borrower experience. This innovation is set to drastically save time and resources for lenders, transforming the industry landscape.

news.headline: Gameto partners with IVFAustralia, part of Virtus Health, based in Australia. Collaboration to focus on IVF services.
news.summary: In a recent development, Gameto has collaborated with IVFAustralia, a leading IVF clinic based in Australia, which is part of Virtus Health. This partnership aims to enhance the services offered by Gameto, a Texas-based company, in the field of in vitro fertilization (IVF). IVFAustralia, known for its expertise and quality care in fertility treatments, will bring a wealth of experience to this collaboration. The partnership is expected to benefit individuals seeking IVF services by providing them with access to top-notch facilities and specialists in the field. This alliance signifies a significant step in the advancement of IVF services, combining the strengths of both companies. It is anticipated that this collaboration will lead to improved outcomes for individuals undergoing fertility treatments.

news.headline: GoAuto Insurance partners with One Inc for digital payment solutions; adopts ClaimsPay® and PremiumPay® for streamlined operations.
news.summary: In Folsom, California, One Inc, a prominent payments network in the insurance sector, recently revealed that GoAuto Insurance (GoAuto) has chosen to utilize One Inc’s ClaimsPay® and PremiumPay® products to enhance their policyholder payment process. This decision aims to provide a seamless and digitized payment experience. By integrating with One Inc’s systems, GoAuto streamlines their workflow with access to a wide range of payment options, all consolidated within a single platform. This move by GoAuto underscores the significance of efficiency and innovation in the insurance industry.

news.headline: Filipino American author Rene "Butch" Meily shares his story of immigrating to the U.S. at age 23; a tale of success.
news.summary: In New York on December 12, 2024, Filipino American author Rene "Butch" Meily released a compelling story of immigrating to the U.S. at 23 and achieving success in the corporate realm. This announcement follows a recent election where immigration emerged as a significant concern. Meily's narrative highlights the journey of navigating a new country and eventually excelling in the business sector.

news.headline: Asymbl, Inc. releases Asymbl Agents Suite on Salesforce AppExchange, offering Agentforce-powered talent solutions.
news.summary: AUSTIN, Texas - On December 12, 2024, Asymbl, Inc., an innovative technology company within the Salesforce ecosystem, revealed the release of Asymbl Agents Suite on Salesforce. This marks the initial Agentforce-driven talent solutions and recruitment application accessible on AppExchange.

news.headline: CureGene received approval for clinical trial in China for CG-0255 injection, an antiplatelet therapy. - PRNewswire
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, in Shanghai, CureGene Pharmaceutical ("CureGene"), a biotechnology firm focused on developing novel therapies for critical gaps in cardio-cerebrovascular and antiviral disease treatment, joyfully discloses the green light given to its Clinical Trial Application.

news.headline: SK bioscience approved for global clinical trials of mRNA Japanese Encephalitis vaccine; USD 40 million in funding from CEPI for February 2025 trials in Australia, with interim results by 2026.
news.summary: In February 2025, SK bioscience plans to begin clinical trials in Australia for their inaugural mRNA vaccine candidate. The interim results are anticipated to be disclosed by 2026. This collaborative research and development effort between SK and CEPI involves an initial funding support of up to USD 40 million from CEPI. SK bioscience is primed to address...

news.headline: Female-founded platform MOTHER EURO helps American moms moving to Europe with expert resources and guidance. Thriving support network.
news.summary: A new platform founded by women is revolutionizing support for mothers living abroad. Launched in Miami on December 12, 2024, the platform provides expert resources, personalized guidance, and a supportive network for mothers navigating life overseas. With a rising number of American families considering expatriation, the demand for such services is on the rise.

news.headline: Myant Corp. will reveal new health platform at CES 2025, showcasing advanced materials and AI to help prevent chronic conditions.
news.summary: A company based in Toronto, Myant Corp., revealed plans to introduce cutting-edge human-AI interfaces at CES 2025. The showcased technology aims to assist individuals susceptible to chronic illnesses in leading healthier and longer lives. The event will welcome visitors to experience the award-winning next-generation technology firsthand.

news.headline: AAR and Air France Industries KLM Engineering & Maintenance to form joint venture in Asia-Pacific region; agreement announced on Dec 12, 2024.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, in Wood Dale, Illinois, and also in Paris, Amstelveen, Netherlands, and Chonburi, Thailand, a significant partnership was announced between AAR CORP. which is listed on the NYSE as AIR, a top aviation services provider for commercial and government entities, MROs, and OEMs, and Air France Industries KLM Engineering & Maintenance.

news.headline: Aviation Safety Solutions and Corporate Aviation Security International partner to enhance aviation safety and security in business sector.
news.summary: A company specializing in Safety Management Systems (SMS) consulting, Aviation Safety Solutions, based in Janesville, Wisconsin, announced on December 12, 2024, its partnership with Corporate Aviation Security International (CASI), a veteran-owned provider of security services for business aviation. The collaboration aims to enhance security and safety measures within the aviation industry.

news.headline: NLX hires Christian Wagner as Chief Customer Officer and promotes Derrick Bradley to Chief Product Officer. The company aims to drive growth and innovation in AI-powered conversational experiences. Executives to lead the company to the next level.
news.summary: NLX, a leading AI platform for advanced conversational experiences, revealed its plan to boost growth and innovation by expanding its executive team. The announcement was made today in New York on December 12, 2024. NLX aims to enhance AI-powered conversational experiences for top brands worldwide. This move comes as part of the company's strategy to stay ahead in the market and capitalize on the increasing demand for cutting-edge technology solutions. With the expanded team, NLX looks to leverage its expertise to drive the next phase of development.

news.headline: 40% of tech workers fear skills will become outdated in 3 years, urging employers to adapt quickly.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, on December 12, 2024, it was reported that 40% of technology workers anticipate their skills becoming outdated within the next three years, emphasizing the need for companies to focus on more effective learning strategies for the year 2025. This finding underscores the importance of ongoing skill development and highlights the rapid pace of change in the tech industry.

news.headline: Nano Labs holds over 360 BTC, valued at $36 million. Leading fabless IC design company in China.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, Nano Labs Ltd (Nasdaq: NA), a prominent fabless integrated circuit design company and product solution provider based in China, revealed their recent boost in Bitcoin (BTC) holdings. The company, also known as "we," shared this update indicating an increase in their investment in the cryptocurrency.

news.headline: Nashville Metro Govt chooses Oracle Fusion Cloud Apps for efficiency, decision-making, and service delivery. Dec 12, 2024.
news.summary: Nashville Metro Government, along with Davidson County and Nashville Public Schools, has announced a partnership with Oracle to boost productivity and enhance services. The decision aims to streamline operations and improve decision-making processes. The initiative was revealed on December 12, 2024, and involves implementing Oracle Fusion Cloud Applications to achieve these goals. This move signifies a step towards greater efficiency and service delivery for the city of Nashville, with hopes to benefit a significant number of people in the community.

news.headline: Hyundai Mobis will unveil the world's first full-windshield holographic display at CES 2025, offering panoramic driving info.
news.summary: A cutting-edge windshield display will showcase vital driving data across the full width of the windshield, providing an immersive experience that extends from the driver's side to the passenger's side. Hyundai Mobis will introduce its range of user-focused technologies at the event, including...

news.headline: PubMatic and GroupM enhance partnership to boost Latin America market with GPM, delivering transparency.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, GroupM and PubMatic announced their expanded global partnership to enhance GroupM Premium Marketplace (GPM) in the LATAM region. This collaboration between WPP’s media investment group and the independent technology company aims to increase transparency and efficiency in media buying. GroupM clients will now have direct access to PubMatic’s premium publisher inventory in order to improve their advertising strategies. This move is part of efforts to strengthen the programmatic market and provide better services for clients in the LATAM region.

news.headline: Over 1/3 of public sector employees have less than $500 in savings. Purchasing Power survey offers solutions for HR leaders.
news.summary: A report from Purchasing Power® reveals insights from their second annual Public Sector Financial Wellness survey, highlighting key solutions for HR leaders to support employees. Released in Atlanta on December 12, 2024, the survey conducted by the financial wellness voluntary benefits firm offers important data for decision-makers. The findings aim to address the financial needs of public sector employees, providing HR leaders with immediate strategies to enhance their workforce's financial wellness. This data-driven approach is crucial for organizations looking to support their employees effectively.
